basics.name: Dr. Isabella Boux
basics.label: Data Scientist | Cognitive Neuroscientist | Linguist
basics.summary: Data science trainee with a PhD in neurolinguistics and 8+ years of experience analyzing complex behavioral and neurophysiological data. Skilled in R, Python, and Matlab, with strong expertise in statistical modeling, data analysis, and real-world human data. Currently applying machine learning methods to real-world datasets, with a particular interest for eHealth and medicine.

work.name: Max Planck Institute for Human Development

education.institution: Berlin School of Mind and Brain at Humboldt University of Berlin

awards.title: Doctoral scholarship
awards.summary: Received ~35K EUR for conducting research in the field of Neurosciences in Berlin.

awards.title: Teaching award (co-recipient)
awards.awarder: Philosophical Faculty of the RWTH AAchen University
awards.summary: The proze was awarded for the course 'Experimentalpsychologisches Praktikum', recognizing innovative, research-oriented teaching.
